profile.name: Daljeet Singh Lotey
profile.title: Software Developer
profile.tagline: Building practical systems across full-stack product engineering, AI, and infrastructure.
summary: Daljeet is a software developer who ships full-stack applications, AI-driven products, and developer tooling with a systems mindset.
This terminal is designed as a real interface: searchable, extensible, keyboard-first, and grounded in actual portfolio data.

projects.name: Janus
projects.description: Adversarial botnet detection system focused on resilient network telemetry analysis.
projects.readme:
# Janus
Adversarial botnet detection with a systems-first pipeline designed for noisy network traffic and operational visibility.
highlights: Built in Go for operational simplicity and throughput.
Uses Redis-backed workflows and Dockerized services.
Designed around hostile, adversarial traffic patterns.

projects.name: DrishT
projects.description: Dual-stream AI navigation system exploring visual perception and decision support.
projects.readme:
# DrishT
Dual-stream AI navigation thesis project combining perception and guidance layers for assistive navigation.
highlights: Research-oriented system architecture with real-time inference considerations.
Combines computer vision and navigation reasoning.

projects.name: S&P 500 Prediction
projects.description: ML-based financial time series experimentation over S&P 500 data.
projects.readme:
# S&P 500 Prediction
Exploration of machine learning techniques for financial time series forecasting and evaluation.
highlights: Feature engineering and experimentation with classical ML models.
Focused on evaluation discipline rather than hype.

~.bio.txt:
Daljeet Singh Lotey. Software Developer based in Mumbai.
I build product systems, backend services, AI features, and interfaces that reward power users.

I believe great software is opinionated, composable, and observable.
~.now.txt:
Currently building terminal.daljeetsingh.me as a living portfolio interface.
Stack: Next.js 14, xterm.js, TypeScript, Zustand, Vercel AI SDK.
Focusing on: systems thinking, developer experience, and shipping craft-level work.

janus.README.md:
# Janus
Adversarial botnet detection in Go with an operations-first architecture.

Designed for hostile, noisy network environments.
Uses Redis-backed workflows and Dockerized service containers.
Focused on operational visibility over academic metrics.

drisht.README.md:
# DrishT
Dual-stream AI navigation thesis system for perception-guided assistance.

Combines computer vision and navigation reasoning layers.
Research-oriented with real-time inference considerations.
Implemented with Python-first ML tooling.

sp500.README.md:
# S&P 500 Prediction
ML-based financial time series forecasting experiments.

Feature engineering with classical ML models.
Focused on evaluation discipline over hype.
Built with Python data tooling.
